module Acme.Pricing (priceQuote) where

priceQuote :: Order -> Money
priceQuote = undefined

module Acme.Pricing (priceQuote) where

priceQuote :: Order -> Either PricingError Money
priceQuote o
  | null (orderLines o) = Left EmptyOrder
  | otherwise           = Right (sumLines o)
